title: RUSTINS WHPU500 500ml Quick Dry Primer Undercoat - Fast-Drying Paint Base for Smooth Coverage; Easy-to-Use Interior & Exterior Prep Coat for Walls, Woodwork & DIY Home Decorating
features: High Coverage: Rustins White Primer/Undercoat provides excellent coverage, ensuring a smooth and even base for your topcoat; It effectively seals surfaces and enhances the finish
Fast Drying: This primer/undercoat dries quickly, allowing you to complete your painting projects faster; Within hours, your surfaces will be ready for the next coat
Versatile Use: Suitable for a variety of surfaces including wood and plaster; Rustins White Primer/Undercoat is perfect for interior and exterior applications; ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: This primer/undercoat can be easily applied with a brush, roller, or spray, ensuring a hassle-free painting experience with excellent adhesion and smooth results
Available in Various Sizes: Rustins White Primer/Undercoat is available in multiple sizes to suit different project needs, whether it's a small touch-up job or a larger painting project
